description: ActiveCampaign is a customer experience automation platform for email marketing, CRM, automations, and ecommerce-related customer data. Businesses use it to manage contacts, campaigns, deals, automations, and connected app workflows.
summary: ActiveCampaign exposes a tenant-specific REST API v3, an Ecommerce GraphQL API, and a remote MCP server; public docs show API-key auth for REST/GraphQL and an account-specific private MCP endpoint authenticated via ActiveCampaign OAuth/login flow.

surfaces.name: ActiveCampaign Remote MCP Server
surfaces.url: private MCP endpoint copied from ActiveCampaign Settings → Developer
